name: haunted-manor
description: Old, historic, haunted-house mood — warm-brown darkness with candlelight amber and a ghostly cold-teal accent. Color theory: near-analogous warm-brown base (hue ~30 deg) with an amber primary accent for warmth/light sources, and a desaturated cold teal secondary accent for a near-complementary supernatural pop. Verified WCAG AA+ contrast for body text; warn/danger separated by luminance (not hue alone) for color-blind accessibility.
